name: Bacillus subtilis 168
shortDescription: Gram-positive, spore-forming model bacterium with QPS (EFSA) status and a long history of safe industrial use. Spores make it robust for field-deployable and environmental biosensors.

safety.grasBasis: EFSA Qualified Presumption of Safety (QPS); long history of use in food enzymes and fermentation.
safety.biocontainment: Spore-based and auxotrophic containment; widely used in contained industrial fermentation.
safety.bslSource: ABSA Risk Group 1; EFSA QPS list.
safety.notes: Naturally competent for DNA uptake; excellent protein secretion.

engineering.crisprTools: dCas9/CRISPRi adapted for B. subtilis (e.g. Peters et al.).
